title.en: Subsequently, Ye Tian fused all the Hailou Gold...

content.en:
Subsequently, Ye Tian fused all the Hailou Gold into pieces of Hailou Tianjin.

With so much Hailou Tianjin, Ye Tian was also ready to attack the second stage of the high-level immeasurable life form and the extreme realm of the infinite body.

"Let's hit the second stage first, this one is slightly easier!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Immediately, he took out some Hailou Heavenly Gold to condense the immeasurable bones.

I have to say that it is really too extravagant to use Hailou Tianjin to condense immeasurable bones, like other high-level immeasurable lifeforms at most use Hailou Gold to condense immeasurable bones, Hailou Tianjin is all to keep and condense immeasurable blood, where dare to waste a piece of Hailou Tianjin!

And Ye Tian is not short of Hailou Tianjin, so he doesn't care about this consumption.

"Let's start condensing the immeasurable bones!"

Ye Tian absorbed pieces of Hailou Tianjin, and began to construct immeasurable bones in his body.

He was going to condense the hand bones first, after all, if the hand bones were condensed, he would use the amputated fingers, and the power he would exert would be even stronger.

With the passage of time, as the power of Hailou Tianjin continued to guide into the position of the index finger of the right hand, an immeasurable bone gradually condensed.

Rumble!!!!!

With the condensation of this immeasurable bone, Ye Tian seemed to have broken some kind of shackles, and his flesh and blood body began to transform, absorbing the energy of the outside world to ascend wildly.

It took a long time for this metamorphosis to come to an end.

"I have broken through and stepped into the second stage of the high-level immeasurable lifeform - the immeasurable bone stage!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

At this moment, his strength has increased by nearly four or five times, and this is only a breakthrough, only one immeasurable bone has been condensed, and as more and more immeasurable bones are condensed, his strength will become stronger and stronger.

At this point, he was faced with two choices.

One is to begin to condense the second immeasurable bone, and the other is to continue to refine the first immeasurable bone.

According to the secret he understood, the immeasurable bone was condensed, and it could still continue to be condensed and refined, and this immeasurable bone could be tempered to a more solid and powerful level, but it also consumed a lot of resources.

And no matter how much the Infinite Bone is refined, it is impossible to be several times stronger than before, at most it is only a few times stronger.

Therefore, after other high-level immeasurable lifeforms condensed the immeasurable bone, they would not waste resources to refine him.

Just like the existence of the Void Whale Overlord, who condenses the immeasurable bone, he definitely did not refine the immeasurable bone many times, after all, it is very difficult to quench the immeasurable bone itself, and it needs to consume a large amount of Hailou Gold and even Hailou Tianjin to complete the extreme quenching.

And how could the Void Whale Overlord give up such a resource!

In addition, the consumption of resources is not proportional to the improvement of strength, and the Void Whale Overlord will not do this.

However, Ye Tian is not short of Hailou Tianjin, if he has Hailou Tianjin, it is easier for him to refine the immeasurable bone, but he will spend a lot more Hailou Tianjin.

"If the three hundred and sixty-five immeasurable bones are all tempered to the limit, it will definitely be of great benefit!"

Ye Tian guessed.

Therefore, he decided to refine the Infinite Bone to the limit.

Subsequently, Ye Tian took out the Hailou Heavenly Gold to refine this first immeasurable bone.

With the consumption of Hailou Tianjin, although the first immeasurable bone has been refined, the effect of the improvement is minimal, and it is not even felt, I am afraid that it will take a long time to temper before you can feel the improvement of this immeasurable bone.

"I can't feel the improvement when I use the Hailou Heavenly Gold Quenching, and other high-level immeasurable lifeforms can't feel the improvement after refining with the Hailou Gold for a long time, no wonder there are no high-level immeasurable lifeforms who choose to continue refining!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Fortunately, after a long time, this immeasurable bone can still be improved.

Before you know it, the first year of the One Million Realms has passed.

Finally, this first immeasurable bone was completely tempered to the limit, and it could not be further refined.

And he also spent fifty yuan of Hailou Tianjin, which is an unacceptable data for the Void Whale Overlord, and they can't afford it at all!

It costs fifty pieces of Hailou Tianjin to quench an immeasurable bone to the limit, so what about three hundred and sixty-five immeasurable bones to be tempered to the limit, wouldn't it cost more than 10,000 pieces of Hailou Tianjin?

A high-level immeasurable lifeform like the Void Whale Overlord could gather one or two thousand Hailou Heavenly Gold to condense immeasurable blood, so it was impossible for them to accumulate more than 10,000 Hailou Heavenly Gold for extreme tempering.

"The power of an immeasurable bone has been increased by more than thirty percent, but it has not improved the overall strength, it seems that all three hundred and sixty-five immeasurable bones must be condensed and tempered to the limit, so that the overall strength can be qualitatively transformed!" Ye Tian said darkly.

The years passed, and more than 30 million realms had passed in the blink of an eye.

At this time.

Ye Tian had already condensed thirty-six immeasurable bones, and they had all been tempered to the limit, and his strength was much stronger than in the past.

At the same time, he was also consuming Hailou Heavenly Gold to improve his Infinite Body, but if he wanted to cultivate the superior Immeasurable Infinite Body Infinite Body to the extreme realm, it was not easy, even if he had a large amount of Hailou Tianjin, it would take time to break through!

Ye Tian was still cultivating, and the Voidless Galaxy was about to give birth to an overlord who had condensed immeasurable blood.

......

Dragonscale Abyss.

At this time, the Dragon Scale Overlord was in the third stage, and he had traded enough Hailou Heavenly Gold from the Void Whale Overlord, plus the Hailou Heavenly Gold he had collected over the years, and finally gathered enough Hailou Heavenly Gold.

Coupled with the collection of auxiliary materials during this time, as well as some other preparations, it finally began to condense immeasurable blood.

Rumble!!!!

Countless materials plus Hailou Heavenly Gold were absorbed into the body by the Dragon Scale Overlord, and then began to condense immeasurable blood.

As time passed, a drop of golden-red blood began to condense.

This is not ordinary blood, but immeasurable blood containing immeasurable extreme dao and terrifying qi blood, but it has not yet been completely formed, and it can only be said to be in an unformed state of initial condensation.

As the materials continued to be consumed, this drop of immeasurable blood gradually took shape, exuding a terrifying coercion.

If it is used to deal with a mid-level immeasurable lifeform, a drop of immeasurable blood is enough to crush the body of a mid-level immeasurable lifeform, and even the boundary of the Silent Black Sea cannot withstand the breath emitted by a drop of immeasurable blood, and it will be collapsed directly.

If the high-level immeasurable lifeforms that condense immeasurable blood do not converge their breath, the breath alone can cause countless territories to collapse and annihilate the eternal time and space.

The difference in strength between a high-level immeasurable lifeform with immeasurable blood and a high-level immeasurable lifeform that has not condensed immeasurable blood is too big!

"Hahaha, it's finally time to break through!"

The Dragon Scale Overlord said excitedly.
